title: Enhanced Shulkers x Fresh Animations
description: Makes Enhanced Shulkers compatible with Fresh Animations
body:
![shulkers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52eef057d8bdec1abdd4cf6fd94f0f16d618b8dc.png)

This resource pack adds compatibility for [Enhanced Shulkers](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enhanced-shulkerss) with [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations).

### Requirements
This resource pack requires [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures).

Also, you need to put the resource packs in the correct order.

Put Enhanced Shulkers x Fresh Animations above Fresh Animations

![shulkers x fresh animations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89600942ba12cbc9f087b8881fc13768ce830b8f.png)
